content.en:
"It is true that you have to cultivate better secret arts, after all, it is estimated that you may come into contact with more ninth realms in the future, if there is no better secret technique to cover up the deduction and tracking, it is easy to be killed by all the copy bodies, then it will be completely lost!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He searched for the specific information of the Ten Pyloric Sects while looking for better secret techniques.

Before you know it, a period of time has passed.

Ye Tian had already come to the ninety-seventh territory where the Ten Pyloric Gates were located, and it was easy to learn about the specific situation of the Ten Pyloric Gates here, and even occasionally heard some rumors about the Poisonous Dragon Realm Lord, this was not his deliberate inquiry, and he was not afraid of being deduced by the Poisonous Dragon Realm Lord.

However, he couldn't easily access the extradimensional realm of the eighth realm, and a lot of information could not be explored.

So, he copied the bodies of other other Seventh Realms and infiltrated the forces that did not have the Ninth Realm, so as to probe information through these "Seven-Two-Three" forces, collect more information about the Ten Pyloric Gates, and conceal the secret techniques of tracking and deduction.

Gradually, a long time passed.

Ye Tian gradually inquired about several secret techniques that could evade the tracking of the Ninth Realm, but he only knew the name, and it was not something he could obtain.

this day.

Ye Tian brought a lot of information about the Ten Pyloric Sects to the Spell Spirit Gold Vein and handed it over to the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

After reading these information, the Purple Yun Realm Lord said, "Sure enough, after the destruction of our Tianyun Sect, the strength of the Ten Pyloric Sects has increased a lot, and it seems that the strength of the Poisonous Dragon Realm Lord has also improved. "

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, I want to cultivate a secret technique that can evade the tracking and deduction of the Ninth Realm, do you have such a secret technique in your hands?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No!" the Purple Yun Realm Lord shook his head, "There are indeed a lot of secret techniques that can evade the tracking and deduction of the Ninth Realm, but almost all of them are in the hands of those nine forces, even if some of them flow out, they are all fragments, and they can't be cultivated to the extent of avoiding the tracking of the Ninth Realm, and some of them are really too side effects, who dares to cultivate?"

Just when Ye Tian was disappointed, the Purple Yun Realm Lord said again: "If you really want this kind of secret technique, I know the traces of a secret technique. "

"What secret technique?"

Ye Tian is looking forward to it.

"Mist-eyed Soul Technique!" the Purple Yun Realm Lord introduced: "This secret technique is very strange, and the difficulty of cultivation is not great, but it needs to be cultivated in one place, otherwise it cannot be practiced, and that place is very terrifying, and it is extremely easy to enter, and it is almost lifeless." "

"Oh, what is it?" Ye Tian was very interested.

"Mist-Eyed Star, located in the fifteenth dimension, was once a mysterious star in the sixteenth dimension, but after a great battle, the Mist-Eyed Star fell into the fifteenth dimension. But even so, with your current strength, you can't enter the fifteenth dimension. The Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

The fifteenth dimension?

Ye Tian frowned, he really couldn't enter the fifteenth dimension, his soul will was about to break through to the fourteenth dimension, at best, he could enter the fourteenth dimension, but he couldn't enter the fifteenth dimension.

Unless he breaks through to the eighth realm, he can enter the fifteenth dimension.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord said again: "Don't count on me, I can't take you into the fifteenth dimension, otherwise that Poisonous Dragon Realm Lord will know about it as soon as possible, so he will hunt me down, and then I may not have a chance to escape back here." Even if we cooperate, I can't help you. Besides, entering the Misty Eye Star is too dangerous, almost certain death, and even if you are lucky, you may not be able to enter that position to cultivate the Misty Eye Soul Technique, unless you can find a Ninth Realm to help you. "

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, I understand!"

Ye Tian didn't say anything, and the Purple Yun Realm Lord thought that Ye Tian had given up and didn't say anything.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left here.

......

"I can't enter the fifteenth dimension, but maybe there are forces that can help me enter the fifteenth dimension!" Ye Tian muttered.

He was going to find out which force developed the resources of the fifteenth dimension and recruited the seventh realm to do the task, he could completely take the task and enter the fifteenth dimension through that force.

Soon.

He really inquired.

【Red Blood Sect】

This force is developing an area in the fifteenth dimension, and it needs a lot of help from the seventh realm, after all, the sixth realm can't survive in the fifteenth dimension, and the minimum requirements are the seventh realm.

However, the number of the seventh realm of the Red Blood Sect is limited, and this task is very dangerous, so it can only recruit some scattered cultivators to help.

And this task of the Red Blood Sect is to mine the fragment area of a special multidimensional star, where many special ore veins have been born, and the Red Blood Sect occupies that area, of course, it also pays a great price.

Now, the Red Blood Sect only wants to complete the mining quickly, and it has also blocked that area0

"Let's use the Red Blood Sect to enter the fifteenth dimension!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Red Blood Sect.

Ye Tian signed up for the task of mining the multi-dimensional star fragment area in the fifteenth dimension, and soon entered the fifteenth dimension through the multi-dimensional void channel established by the Red Blood Sect.

Red Sun Fragment area.

This place was covered by countless invisible flames, and ordinary seventh realms would not be able to last long when they entered here, but Ye Tian's strength was strong, so he naturally didn't care about this flame power.

Subsequently.

Under the arrangement of the Red Blood Sect, he mined a vein in this area with the Red Sun Flint Stone, which was very tough and extremely hot, and could scorch the Seventh Realm, and only the Seventh Realm could be mined.

The Eighth Realm is naturally okay, but the Eighth Realm will not come here to mine veins.

Ye Tian honestly mined the mining veins at first, but secretly looked for an opportunity, condensed a copy body to escape from this Red Sun Fragment area, and then went to the Misty Eye Star.

At the beginning, entering the seventh realm here would be insisted on, but Ye Tian insisted for a long time, and he was honest, so he didn't pay much attention to him.

And Ye Tian observed it very clearly by copying his talent.

Seeing that there was no strong person snooping on him, he immediately began to condense a copy body, and then came to the weakest place in this blockade area.

3.8 "Primal Sword Domain!"

"Broken!"

Under the blow, the power of a blow comparable to that of the Eighth Realm directly shattered this area, and then he quickly fled.

Soon.

Rumble!!!!

An Eighth Realm Extradimensional Realm, many Seventh Realms have descended here, and they all belong to the Chiyang Sect.

"There's a seventh realm that has escaped from here!"

"Who is it?"

"Search now!"

Soon, the Eighth Realm summoned the Seventh Realm here, but after some searching, no one from the Seventh Realm was found.

What's more, they sensed the breath of the Primal Star from the traces of the attack, and no matter how they deduced it, they couldn't deduce the traces of the other party, which showed that the other party's origin was not ordinary.

In addition, there was no loss, and the Chiyang Sect immediately put this matter behind and did not dare to continue the investigation.
